org.docgene.model

Class XMLIndex

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.docgene.model.AbstractXMLParent
      • org.docgene.model.AbstractXMLParentArticle
        • org.docgene.model.XMLArticle
          • org.docgene.model.XMLIndex
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    java.lang.Comparable<org.docgene.model.Article>, org.docgene.model.Article, org.docgene.model.globals.PackagedElement, org.docgene.model.globals.RootElement, org.docgene.model.globals.XMLRootElement, org.docgene.model.HTMLOutput, XMLParent, XMLParentArticle

    public class XMLIndex
extends XMLArticle
    Represents an XML index article.
    Since:
    1.6.7
